title: ApprovalRequest
description: Request shown to the user in the approval dialog. Generated by Agent Host, displayed by Desktop App.

approvalId.description: Unique identifier for this approval request, generated by Agent Host before showing UI.

title.description: Short title shown in the approval dialog header.

actionSummary.description: Human-readable summary of the action requiring approval.

riskLevel.description: Risk level set by the Policy Enforcer.
